meaning_english: A round fruit with red or green skin and a whitish interior.
example_english: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
example_hindi: रोज़ एक सेब खाने से बीमारियाँ दूर रहती हैं।

meaning_english: A long curved fruit which grows in clusters and has soft pulpy flesh and yellow skin when ripe.
example_english: Monkeys love to eat bananas.
example_hindi: बंदरों को केले खाना बहुत पसंद है।

meaning_english: A round citrus fruit with a tough bright reddish-yellow rind.
example_english: She drank a glass of fresh orange juice.
example_hindi: उसने एक गिलास ताज़ा संतरे का रस पिया।

meaning_english: A fleshy yellowish-red tropical fruit.
example_english: Mango is the king of fruits.
example_hindi: आम फलों का राजा है।

meaning_english: Berries growing in clusters on a grapevine.
example_english: These grapes are very sweet.
example_hindi: ये अंगूर बहुत मीठे हैं।

meaning_english: A starchy plant tuber which is one of the most important food crops.
example_english: I like boiled potatoes.
example_hindi: मुझे उबले हुए आलू पसंद हैं।

meaning_english: A glossy red, or occasionally yellow, pulpy edible fruit.
example_english: We need tomatoes for the salad.
example_hindi: हमें सलाद के लिए टमाटर चाहिए।

meaning_english: An edible bulb with a pungent taste and smell.
example_english: Chopping onions makes me cry.
example_hindi: प्याज काटने से मुझे रोना आता है।

meaning_english: A strong-smelling pungent-tasting bulb, used as a flavoring.
example_english: Garlic adds a lot of flavor to the food.
example_hindi: लहसुन भोजन में बहुत स्वाद जोड़ता है।

meaning_english: A hot, fragrant spice made from the rhizome of a plant.
example_english: I prefer ginger tea in the winter.
example_hindi: मुझे सर्दियों में अदरक की चाय पसंद है।

meaning_english: A tapering orange-colored root eaten as a vegetable.
example_english: Rabbits love eating carrots.
example_hindi: खरगोशों को गाजर खाना बहुत पसंद है।

meaning_english: A cultivated plant eaten as a vegetable, having thick green or purple leaves.
example_english: She made a healthy cabbage soup.
example_hindi: उसने एक पौष्टिक पत्ता गोभी का सूप बनाया।

meaning_english: A vegetable with a large white flower head.
example_english: Cauliflower can be roasted or boiled.
example_hindi: फूल गोभी को भूना या उबाला जा सकता है।

meaning_english: An edible Asian plant with large dark green leaves.
example_english: Spinach is rich in iron.
example_hindi: पालक में आयरन भरपूर मात्रा में होता है।

meaning_english: A swamp grass which is widely cultivated as a source of food.
example_english: They eat rice with curry.
example_hindi: वे करी के साथ चावल खाते हैं।

meaning_english: A cereal plant that is the most important kind grown in temperate countries.
example_english: Wheat is used to make flour.
example_hindi: गेहूं का उपयोग आटा बनाने के लिए किया जाता है।

meaning_english: Food made of flour, water, and yeast mixed together and baked.
example_english: I had a slice of bread for breakfast.
example_hindi: मैंने नाश्ते में ब्रेड का एक टुकड़ा खाया।

meaning_english: A pale yellow edible fatty substance made by churning cream.
example_english: She spread butter on her toast.
example_hindi: उसने अपने टोस्ट पर मक्खन लगाया।

meaning_english: A food made from the pressed curds of milk.
example_english: The pizza has extra cheese.
example_hindi: पिज़्ज़ा में अतिरिक्त चीज़ है।

meaning_english: An opaque white fluid rich in fat and protein, secreted by female mammals.
example_english: Drink a glass of warm milk before bed.
example_hindi: सोने से पहले एक गिलास गर्म दूध पिएं।

meaning_english: An oval or round object laid by a female bird, reptile, fish, or invertebrate.
example_english: He had a boiled egg for breakfast.
example_hindi: उसने नाश्ते में एक उबला हुआ अंडा खाया।

meaning_english: The flesh of an animal as food.
example_english: He doesn't eat meat.
example_hindi: वह मांस नहीं खाता है।

meaning_english: A domestic fowl kept for its eggs or meat.
example_english: We are having roast chicken for dinner.
example_hindi: हम रात के खाने में भुना हुआ चिकन खा रहे हैं।

meaning_english: A limbless cold-blooded vertebrate animal with gills and fins.
example_english: They caught a large fish in the river.
example_hindi: उन्होंने नदी में एक बड़ी मछली पकड़ी।

meaning_english: A high-protein pulse which is dried and then soaked and cooked prior to eating.
example_english: Lentil soup is very healthy.
example_hindi: मसूर दाल का सूप बहुत सेहतमंद होता है।

meaning_english: An edible seed, typically kidney-shaped.
example_english: Green beans are good for health.
example_hindi: हरी फलियां स्वास्थ्य के लिए अच्छी होती हैं।

meaning_english: A sweet crystalline substance obtained from various plants.
example_english: Do you take sugar in your tea?
example_hindi: क्या आप अपनी चाय में चीनी लेते हैं?

meaning_english: A white crystalline substance that gives seawater its characteristic taste.
example_english: Add a pinch of salt to the dish.
example_hindi: पकवान में एक चुटकी नमक डालें।

meaning_english: A pungent hot-tasting powder prepared from dried and ground peppercorns.
example_english: Sprinkle some black pepper on the eggs.
example_hindi: अंडों पर थोड़ी काली मिर्च छिड़कें।

meaning_english: An aromatic or pungent vegetable substance used to flavor food.
example_english: Indian food uses a lot of spices.
example_hindi: भारतीय भोजन में बहुत सारे मसालों का उपयोग होता है।

meaning_english: A viscous liquid derived from petroleum or plants, used for cooking.
example_english: Heat the oil in a frying pan.
example_hindi: फ्राईंग पैन में तेल गरम करें।

meaning_english: A powder obtained by grinding grain.
example_english: Mix the flour and water to make dough.
example_hindi: आटा और पानी मिलाकर गूंथ लें।

meaning_english: A sweet, sticky yellowish-brown fluid made by bees.
example_english: She put some honey in her green tea.
example_hindi: उसने अपनी ग्रीन टी में थोड़ा शहद डाला।

meaning_english: A fruit consisting of a hard or tough shell around an edible kernel.
example_english: Eating nuts is good for your brain.
example_hindi: मेवे खाना आपके दिमाग के लिए अच्छा है।

meaning_english: The oval nut-like seed of the almond tree.
example_english: I soaked some almonds overnight.
example_hindi: मैंने रात भर कुछ बादाम भिगोए।

meaning_english: An edible kidney-shaped nut.
example_english: He bought a packet of roasted cashews.
example_hindi: उसने भुने हुए काजू का एक पैकेट खरीदा।

meaning_english: The oval seed of a tropical South American plant.
example_english: Peanut butter is my favorite.
example_hindi: मूंगफली का मक्खन मेरा पसंदीदा है।

meaning_english: A colorless, transparent, odorless liquid.
example_english: Drink plenty of water every day.
example_hindi: रोजाना खूब पानी पिएं।

meaning_english: A hot drink made by infusing dried crushed leaves in boiling water.
example_english: Would you like a cup of tea?
example_hindi: क्या आप एक कप चाय लेंगे?

meaning_english: A hot drink made from roasted and ground coffee beans.
example_english: I need a strong cup of coffee in the morning.
example_hindi: मुझे सुबह एक कड़क कॉफी चाहिए।

meaning_english: The liquid obtained from or present in fruit or vegetables.
example_english: Fresh apple juice is very refreshing.
example_hindi: ताज़ा सेब का जूस बहुत ताज़गी देने वाला होता है।

meaning_english: A drink made from lemon juice and sweetened water.
example_english: She served chilled lemonade to the guests.
example_hindi: उसने मेहमानों को ठंडा नींबू पानी परोसा।

meaning_english: A liquid dish, typically made by boiling meat, fish, or vegetables.
example_english: Tomato soup is perfect for cold evenings.
example_hindi: टमाटर का सूप ठंडी शामों के लिए एकदम सही है।

meaning_english: Cook (food) by dry heat without direct exposure to a flame, typically in an oven.
example_english: She is going to bake a cake for his birthday.
example_hindi: वह उसके जन्मदिन के लिए एक केक सेंकने वाली है।

meaning_english: Reach or cause to reach the temperature at which it bubbles and turns to vapor.
example_english: Boil the water before drinking it.
example_hindi: पानी को पीने से पहले उबाल लें।

meaning_english: Cook (food) in hot fat or oil, typically in a shallow pan.
example_english: Fry the potatoes until they are golden brown.
example_hindi: आलू को सुनहरा भूरा होने तक तलें।

meaning_english: Cook (food, especially meat) by prolonged exposure to heat in an oven or over a fire.
example_english: We roasted peanuts on the fire.
example_hindi: हमने आग पर मूंगफली भूनी।

meaning_english: Cook (something) using a grill.
example_english: They decided to grill some chicken.
example_hindi: उन्होंने कुछ चिकन ग्रिल करने का फैसला किया।

meaning_english: Cut (something) into pieces with repeated sharp blows of an axe or knife.
example_english: Chop the vegetables finely.
example_hindi: सब्जियों को बारीक काट लें।

meaning_english: Cut (something, especially food) into slices.
example_english: Slice the bread before serving.
example_hindi: परोसने से पहले ब्रेड के टुकड़े कर लें।

meaning_english: Remove the outer covering or skin from (a fruit or vegetable).
example_english: Please peel the apple for me.
example_hindi: कृपया मेरे लिए सेब छील दें।

meaning_english: Move a spoon or other implement around in (a liquid or other substance).
example_english: Stir the soup constantly so it doesn't burn.
example_hindi: सूप को लगातार हिलाते रहें ताकि वह जले नहीं।

meaning_english: Combine or put together to form one substance or mass.
example_english: Mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
example_hindi: सभी सामग्रियों को एक बड़े कटोरे में मिला लें।

meaning_english: Flow rapidly in a steady stream.
example_english: Pour the milk into the glass.
example_hindi: गिलास में दूध डालें।

meaning_english: Work (moistened flour or clay) into dough or paste with the hands.
example_english: She began to knead the dough for bread.
example_hindi: उसने ब्रेड के लिए आटा गूंथना शुरू किया।

meaning_english: Stay just below boiling point while bubbling gently.
example_english: Let the soup simmer for ten minutes.
example_hindi: सूप को दस मिनट तक धीमी आंच पर पकने दें।

meaning_english: Cook (food) by heating it in steam from boiling water.
example_english: Steam the vegetables to keep them healthy.
example_hindi: सब्जियों को सेहतमंद रखने के लिए भाप में पकाएं।

meaning_english: Beat or stir (a substance, especially cream or eggs) with a light, rapid movement.
example_english: Whisk the eggs in a bowl.
example_hindi: एक कटोरे में अंडे फेंट लें।

meaning_english: Reduce (food) to small shreds by rubbing it on a grater.
example_english: Grate some cheese over the pasta.
example_hindi: पास्ता के ऊपर थोड़ा पनीर कद्दूकस कर लें।

meaning_english: Perceive or experience the flavor of.
example_english: Taste the curry and add salt if needed.
example_hindi: करी को चखें और जरूरत हो तो नमक डालें।

meaning_english: Present (food or drink) to someone.
example_english: Serve the food while it is hot.
example_hindi: खाना गर्म रहते ही परोसें।

meaning_english: A set of instructions for preparing a particular dish.
example_english: I found a great recipe for chocolate cake.
example_hindi: मुझे चॉकलेट केक की एक बेहतरीन रेसिपी मिली है।

meaning_english: Any of the foods or substances that are combined to make a particular dish.
example_english: Check if we have all the ingredients.
example_hindi: जांच लें कि क्या हमारे पास सभी सामग्री है।

meaning_english: A metal container used for cooking food in.
example_english: Heat the pan on the stove.
example_hindi: कड़ाही को गैस पर गरम करें।

meaning_english: A container, typically rounded or cylindrical, used for cooking.
example_english: Boil the water in a large pot.
example_hindi: एक बड़े बर्तन में पानी उबालें।

meaning_english: A round, deep dish or basin used for food or liquid.
example_english: She poured soup into the bowl.
example_hindi: उसने कटोरे में सूप डाला।

meaning_english: An implement consisting of a small, shallow oval or round bowl on a long handle.
example_english: Eat the ice cream with a spoon.
example_hindi: आइसक्रीम को चम्मच से खाएं।

meaning_english: An implement with two or more prongs used for lifting food to the mouth.
example_english: Use a knife and fork to eat the steak.
example_hindi: स्टेक खाने के लिए चाकू और कांटे का प्रयोग करें।

meaning_english: An instrument composed of a blade fixed into a handle, used for cutting.
example_english: Be careful with that sharp knife.
example_hindi: उस तेज़ चाकू से सावधान रहें।

meaning_english: A flat dish from which food is eaten or served.
example_english: Put the sandwiches on a plate.
example_hindi: सैंडविच को एक प्लेट में रखें।

meaning_english: A small bowl-shaped container for drinking from.
example_english: Would you like a cup of coffee?
example_hindi: क्या आप एक कप कॉफी लेना चाहेंगे?

meaning_english: A meal eaten in the morning.
example_english: I usually have oats for breakfast.
example_hindi: मैं आमतौर पर नाश्ते में ओट्स खाता हूँ।

meaning_english: A meal eaten in the middle of the day.
example_english: We had lunch at a restaurant.
example_hindi: हमने एक रेस्तरां में दोपहर का भोजन किया।

meaning_english: The main meal of the day, taken either around midday or in the evening.
example_english: What is for dinner tonight?
example_hindi: आज रात के खाने में क्या है?

meaning_english: A small amount of food eaten between meals.
example_english: I eat fruits as a healthy snack.
example_hindi: मैं सेहतमंद स्नैक के रूप में फल खाता हूँ।

meaning_english: The sweet course eaten at the end of a meal.
example_english: We had ice cream for dessert.
example_hindi: हमने खाने के बाद मिठाई में आइसक्रीम खाई।

meaning_english: A natural desire to satisfy a bodily need, especially for food.
example_english: Exercise gives you a good appetite.
example_hindi: व्यायाम करने से अच्छी भूख लगती है।

meaning_english: Feeling or displaying the need for food.
example_english: I am very hungry right now.
example_hindi: मुझे अभी बहुत भूख लगी है।

meaning_english: Feeling a need to drink.
example_english: He was thirsty after running.
example_hindi: दौड़ने के बाद उसे प्यास लगी थी।

meaning_english: Highly pleasant to the taste.
example_english: The cake she baked was delicious.
example_hindi: उसने जो केक बनाया वह बहुत स्वादिष्ट था।

meaning_english: Having a pleasant, distinct flavor.
example_english: This soup is really tasty.
example_hindi: यह सूप सचमुच स्वादिष्ट है।

meaning_english: Flavored with or fragrant with spice.
example_english: I love spicy Indian food.
example_hindi: मुझे मसालेदार भारतीय खाना पसंद है।

meaning_english: Having the pleasant taste characteristic of sugar or honey.
example_english: These mangoes are very sweet.
example_hindi: ये आम बहुत मीठे हैं।

meaning_english: Having an acid taste like lemon or vinegar.
example_english: The lemon made the drink sour.
example_hindi: नींबू ने पेय को खट्टा कर दिया।

meaning_english: Having a sharp, pungent taste or smell; not sweet.
example_english: Bitter gourd is good for health.
example_hindi: करेला (कड़वा लौकी) स्वास्थ्य के लिए अच्छा है।

meaning_english: Tasting of, containing, or preserved with salt.
example_english: The soup was too salty to eat.
example_hindi: सूप खाने के लिए बहुत अधिक नमकीन था।

meaning_english: Recently made or obtained; not canned, frozen, or otherwise preserved.
example_english: We bought some fresh vegetables.
example_hindi: हमने कुछ ताजी सब्जियां खरीदीं।

meaning_english: No longer fresh and pleasant to eat; hard, musty, or dry.
example_english: Do not eat stale bread.
example_hindi: बासी रोटी मत खाओ।

meaning_english: Uncooked food.
example_english: Carrots can be eaten raw.
example_hindi: गाजर को कच्चा खाया जा सकता है।

meaning_english: Developed to the point of readiness for harvesting and eating.
example_english: Pick the mangoes when they are ripe.
example_hindi: आम जब पक जाएं तब उन्हें तोड़ लें।
